channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Septoplasty is more costly but more effective than medical management for deviated septum
item.description: Immediate septoplasty is more expensive but clinically more effective than medical management for deviated septum. Over 24 months, immediate...

item.title: Women Wait Longer Than Men for a Thyroid Disease Diagnosis
item.description: Symptoms of hypothyroidism and hyperthyroidism often overlap with other conditions, making differential diagnosis challenging.

item.title: SMC Accepts First Drug to Improve Survival in Uveal Melanoma
item.description: Scotland approves tebentafusp for metastatic uveal melanoma, a rare eye cancer with a median survival of about 12 months. Medscape News UK

item.title: Plant-based wound dressing fights infection before it takes hold
item.description: A new dressing made from plant-based materials delivers antibiotics directly to wounds during critical early infection stages, according to research.
